title: Last One Alive
description: You are the Last One left. They are here to get you. Can you last a week?
body:
# SUMMARY

How Long Will You Live?

This modpack is a hardcore fastpased minecraft experience loosely based on Dying Light.
It's about action and combat with guns and parkour made to have **fun!**

https://discord.gg/AVVkErHhJ -discord server for support

# FEATURES
SURVIVAL-Hardcore thirst, hunger, health and even sanity to take good care of

GUNS CARS AND PLANES- Many unique and customisable guns, vehicles and etc.!

MONSTERS- thanks to Epic Siege (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-siege-mod) and advanced mob ai monsters now truly feel like monster (and have guns)

PARCOUR IN CITIES- ParCool across the world filled with Lost Cities 

OTHER GENERATION- Many nice structures to explore (even i dont remember all of them)

# TUTORIAL
If you dont know what you are getting yourself into, read the part below:

1. LOA is a hardore modpack with strong time management aspects, so **hurry up!**

2. Mobs can quickly kill you in one on one encounters, typically the surface is swarmed with a variety of them after the first night, set up a **base underground!**

3. **Level up!** the deafault key should be " \ " but anything can happen so make sure to check you binds and set them up before generating a world. First 20 levels are gained rapidly and after that there is a steep drop off. Dump your points into constituion and vitality.

4. **Overconfidence is a slow killer**

# **HAVE FUN AND**

---

# **GOOD LUCK!**

---
